Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: coding-B3-usaco-2024-february-gold-bessla-motors
Title: B3. USACO 2024 February Gold / Bessla Motors

Question:
Given a large weighted graph with charging stations, identify all destinations that are reachable from at least K distinct charging stations within the specified range constraint.

Grading target:
Binary hidden-test acceptance.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>

authored_response.decision_notes: The user is asking to solve a complex competitive programming problem (USACO Gold level). This requires high-level algorithmic reasoning, implementation of graph algorithms (likely involving Dijkstra or BFS/DFS with optimizations), and verification against the problem constraints. I will delegate this to a coding specialist agent.
